# Lane of Ceramic
Lane of Ceramic is an artisanal ceramic brand offering dinnerware, drinkware, serveware, and kitchenware.

## Structure
- Home: /
- Categories: /kitchenware, /tableware, /serveware, /drinkware
- Bundles: /bundles/trio, /bundles/five
- About Us: /about
- Contact: /contact

## API
Backend API is available under /api/.
